class.name: PlayFabFriends
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.friends[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab friends-list and friend-tag APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: add_friend_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFFriendsClientAddFriend[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_friends_list_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFFriendsClientGetFriendsList[/code] for [param user]. For this operation, [param request] must include [code]user[/code] with a signed-in GDKUser object; raw local ids are not accepted. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: remove_friend_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFFriendsClientRemoveFriend[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: set_friend_tags_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFFriendsClientSetFriendTags[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.
